summary: Design and plan email marketing campaigns with segmentation, personalization, and compliance checks.

inputs.name: campaign_goal
inputs.description: Primary objective for the email campaign.

inputs.name: audience_segments
inputs.description: Target subscriber segments and their characteristics.

inputs.name: content_theme
inputs.description: Theme or offer for the campaign.

outputs.name: campaign_brief
outputs.description: Campaign strategy with goal, segments, and send plan.

outputs.name: email_copy
outputs.description: Subject lines, body copy, and CTA for each email.

outputs.name: compliance_checklist
outputs.description: CAN-SPAM, GDPR, and deliverability compliance verification.

budget.notes: Focus on compliant, segmented campaign design.

gates.rule: Confirm the request is email campaign creation rather than transactional email or SMS.
Require campaign goal and audience segments before drafting.
Deliver campaign brief with copy and compliance checklist.

steps.action: Define audience segments and personalization strategy.
Draft subject lines, body copy, and CTAs for each email.
Verify CAN-SPAM, GDPR compliance and deliverability best practices.
Produce final campaign brief with send schedule and A/B test plan.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read subscriber data and past campaign performance.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Produce campaign brief and email copy drafts.

verification.method: Check audience segments are specific and actionable.
Check subject lines and body copy are complete.
Check CAN-SPAM and GDPR requirements are met.

success_criteria: Campaign brief covers goal, segments, and send plan.
Email copy is personalized and includes clear CTAs.
Compliance checklist confirms legal and deliverability requirements.

rollback.when: If compliance check fails, revert to copy revision step.
